location: Guaranteed drop from the boss Elemer of the Briar, fought on the roof at the very top of the Shaded Castle.
tactics: Fast-travel to Erdtree-Gazing Hill, head east, and drop into the valley to reach the Shaded Castle; work through Shaded Castle Ramparts and Inner Gate graces before climbing to the roof.

Elemer fights with a curved greatsword and a bleed-inflicting flail-like weapon skill, throwing out wide sweeping combos and an occasional ranged fire attack — stay aggressive and close the distance to limit the fire option.
He also drops the Marais Executioner's Sword alongside this shield, so you get two items from one kill.
lore: A greatshield carried from Eochaid, a distant land of proudly solitary ascetics, wound about with iron thorns — Elemer of the Briar bore it as his own before his fall from grace.

builds.name: Bleed/Arcane greatshield build
builds.why: Its innate bleed buildup on shield bash scales up further with Arcane-scaling affinities like Blood or Occult, letting an Arcane build proc hemorrhage from behind full guard.
